requirements.requirement: Authorized desktop users see the CSAAS top navigation, global left navigation, advisory left sidebar, central conversation area, and collapsed right document drawer using existing shadcn/ui and CSAAS tokens.

tests.name: renders the authorized desktop advisory workspace shell inside the CSAAS frame
signals: CSAAS banner and global navigation present
left advisory sidebar complementary landmark present
right document drawer complementary landmark and collapsed button present
professional empty state and old placeholder removal asserted

tests.name: renders a loading state while access is being verified
signals: preserves Story 1.1 loading behavior while access is pending

tests.name: renders a friendly authorization denied state
signals: denied authz path renders alert and does not leak workspace region

tests.name: renders a clear disabled tenant state
signals: disabled tenant path renders alert and does not leak drawer control

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: N/A - no new endpoint introduced; existing access client coverage remains in frontend/lib/advisory/access.test.ts
heuristics.authz_coverage: positive authorized path plus denied and disabled tenant negative paths covered
heuristics.error_path_coverage: access loading and negative authz states covered; transient fetch exception fallback is pre-existing and outside Story 2.1 AC

requirements.requirement: Viewports below 1024px show a clear desktop-required/recommended state and do not render a squeezed three-column shell.

tests.name: shows a desktop-required state below 1024px without rendering broken shell columns
signals: matchMedia below desktop threshold returns false

heuristics.authz_coverage: gate executes only after authorized access state
heuristics.error_path_coverage: boundary below 1024px covered; 1024px inclusive path covered by desktop-positive test

requirements.requirement: MVP shell copy and empty/completion-ready states remain concise and professional, with no gamification, heavy celebration, decorative AI visuals, or old unavailable-placeholder behavior.

tests.name: renders the authorized desktop advisory workspace shell inside the CSAAS frame
signals: old disabled button copy is absent
old 'workspace will open later' placeholder is absent

tests.name: Acceptance Auditor review
signals: no gamification, celebratory UI, decorative AI hero, provider calls, workflow runtime, or report generation found

heuristics.error_path_coverage: N/A - visual tone constraint validated by smoke assertions and code review

recommendations.action: Run bmad-testarch-test-review if the team wants a separate test-quality audit for the advisory page suite.
